setupInstructions.message: Run the following commands to install required testing packages:
setupInstructions.alternativeMethod: Add the PackageReference elements to your .csproj file and run 'dotnet restore'

fileReports.summary: Added basic test coverage for UnitTest1 class, including method and constructor tests
recommendations: Add more specific test scenarios based on the actual implementation of Test1()
Consider adding parameterized tests if method has input variations
Implement more detailed assertions once method logic is known
fileReports.note: Current tests are minimal due to lack of method implementation details

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ProducerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message production, error handling, and disposal scenarios
recommendations: Consider adding dependency injection for ProducerConfig to improve testability
Implement more robust error handling and logging
Add integration tests with actual Kafka broker for more comprehensive testing
fileReports.note: Tests use localhost:9092 as a placeholder Kafka broker. Replace with actual configuration in real-world scenarios.

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for Startup class covering configuration, dependency injection, environment-specific configurations, and service registration
recommendations: Add more granular configuration testing
Consider adding integration tests with WebApplicationFactory
Implement more detailed environment-specific configuration tests
keyImprovements: Tested service registration and dependency injection
fileReports.note: Ensure Kafka configuration sections are properly configured in appsettings.json

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for ConsumerWrapper with 8 test cases covering constructor validation, message reading scenarios, error handling, and disposal behavior
recommendations: Consider adding more granular error logging in readMessage method
Implement a more robust cancellation token strategy
Add integration tests with actual Kafka configuration
fileReports.note: Tests use reflection to access private consumer field for mocking. Ensure proper access to internal dependencies.

fileReports.summary: Generated basic test for Program.cs to verify host configuration and startup
recommendations: Consider adding more detailed configuration testing
Implement integration tests for startup configuration
Add dependency injection verification
keyImprovements: Ensured Startup class is correctly referenced
Basic null check on host builder
fileReports.note: Limited testing possible due to top-level program structure

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive unit tests for OrderRequest model covering all properties, constructors, and enum status changes with 100% code coverage
recommendations: Consider adding data validation attributes for productname and quantity
Implement custom validation logic for order status transitions
Add XML documentation comments to clarify model constraints
fileReports.note: Tests cover basic model behavior without external dependencies

fileReports.summary: Generated comprehensive test suite for OrderController covering happy path, model validation, null input, constructor initialization, and serialization scenarios
recommendations: Add logging dependency for better testability
Consider extracting Kafka producer logic to improve separation of concerns
Add more robust error handling in PostAsync method
fileReports.note: Requires Confluent.Kafka and Newtonsoft.Json NuGet packages for full functionality
